case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ARJUN DAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DAS, ARJUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.99) SERVED JUL-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAS, ARJUN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-09-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAS, ARJUN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DAS, ARJUN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DAS, ARJUN
